//: Curated map for view-action-ratchet.mjs (#14369): every mutating typed-client method and raw write request that builtin views call, resolved to its registered chat-twin action, a designed exemption, or a tracked gap. Entries whose mutation site disappears from the scan fail the gate until removed, so this file can only shrink toward full action coverage.

acceptRelationshipsCandidate.note: candidate-merge approval — CONTACT carries candidateId/mergeWith/confirmation params

rejectRelationshipsCandidate.note: candidate-merge rejection — same CONTACT merge-review surface

updateModelsConfig.note: per-role model/effort write (POST /api/models/config) from the settings Models panel — same chat twin as the provider switch

updateConfig.note: generic agent-config write; per-section chat coverage is pinned by SETTINGS_WRITE_REGISTRY's completeness test in plugin-app-control

setShellEnabled.note: permissions section route write (PUT /api/permissions/shell) in SETTINGS_WRITE_REGISTRY

initiateCloudOauth.note: connector setup entry point; the OAuth redirect itself completes in-browser

provisionCloudCompatAgent.note: managed-connector backend provisioning for the connectors section

gap.reason: Backups section create has no semantic twin; SETTINGS_WRITE_REGISTRY.advanced is unwired
Backups section restore has no semantic twin; SETTINGS_WRITE_REGISTRY.advanced is unwired

setAppPermissions.note: app-permissions section route write (GET+PUT /api/apps/permissions/:slug) in SETTINGS_WRITE_REGISTRY; read-modify-write grant/revoke of one fs|net namespace via section=app-permissions app=<slug> key=fs|net value=on|off

updateExperience.note: EXPERIENCE action=update rewrites learning/importance/confidence/tags by experienceId (confirm:true)

deleteExperience.note: EXPERIENCE action=delete removes by experienceId or unique query text (confirm:true)

sendInboxMessage.exempt: chat composer send — chat IS the semantic path; a chat twin of chat is circular

createConversation.exempt: chat conversation plumbing (page-scoped threads), not an on-screen view mutation

deleteConversation.exempt: chat conversation plumbing (page-scoped threads), not an on-screen view mutation

updateConversation.exempt: chat conversation plumbing (page-scoped threads), not an on-screen view mutation

clearAllTrajectories.exempt: trajectories is a developerOnly diagnostics view — outside the chat/voice parity contract (design doc: read-only diagnostics need no write action)

deleteTrajectories.exempt: trajectories is a developerOnly diagnostics view — outside the chat/voice parity contract

exportTrajectories.exempt: trajectories is a developerOnly diagnostics view — outside the chat/voice parity contract

seedDevNotifications.exempt: developer-only test-data seeding control in the Backups section

requestPermission.exempt: OS permission prompt requires a user gesture on-device; the agent must not self-grant permissions

refreshPermissions.exempt: re-reads OS permission state after a user-gesture prompt; part of the same non-delegable flow

openPermissionSettings.exempt: opens the OS settings app; user-gesture navigation outside the agent surface

signBrowserWalletMessage.exempt: dapp wallet consent — signatures require explicit user approval; agent-initiated signing is a security boundary violation

sendBrowserWalletTransaction.exempt: dapp wallet consent — transactions require explicit user approval by design

signBrowserSolanaMessage.exempt: dapp wallet consent — signatures require explicit user approval by design

sendBrowserSolanaTransaction.exempt: dapp wallet consent — transactions require explicit user approval by design

startAnthropicLogin.exempt: provider OAuth login is interactive and secret-bearing; never agent-drivable

startOpenAILogin.exempt: provider OAuth login is interactive and secret-bearing; never agent-drivable

exchangeAnthropicCode.exempt: OAuth code exchange completes the interactive login flow

exchangeOpenAICode.exempt: OAuth code exchange completes the interactive login flow

submitAnthropicSetupToken.exempt: setup-token entry is part of the interactive provider login flow

deleteSubscription.exempt: cloud billing — payment/subscription changes are user-interactive by design

createCloudBillingCheckout.exempt: cloud billing — checkout is a user-interactive payment flow

updateCloudBillingSettings.exempt: cloud billing — payment settings are user-interactive by design

deleteCloudCompatAgent.exempt: Eliza Cloud account-scoped agent management, authenticated by the user's cloud session

updateCloudCompatAgent.exempt: Eliza Cloud account-scoped agent management, authenticated by the user's cloud session

revokeTranscriptShare.note: SHARE_TRANSCRIPT owns transcript grant management; revoke is the inverse operation on the same permission surface

updatePlugin.note: agent-rendered plugin card in chat MessageContent; PLUGIN is the enable/configure twin

authorizeDiscordLocal.note: Discord local-connector authorize; CONNECTOR is the setup/control facade

attachAppRun.exempt: app-runtime session IPC for a running mini-app (FullscreenView), not a builtin-view content mutation — launchApp/stopApp are the APP twins

detachAppRun.exempt: app-runtime session IPC for a running mini-app (FullscreenView)

controlAppRun.exempt: app-runtime session control for a running mini-app (FullscreenView)

heartbeatAppRun.exempt: app-runtime session keepalive for a running mini-app (FullscreenView)

sendAppRunMessage.exempt: app-runtime session message IPC for a running mini-app (FullscreenView)

sendAppSessionMessage.exempt: app-runtime session message IPC for a running mini-app (FullscreenView)

stopAppRun.exempt: app-runtime session teardown for a running mini-app (FullscreenView)

startAccountOAuth.exempt: provider OAuth consent — user-gesture browser handshake in AddAccountDialog

cancelAccountOAuth.exempt: provider OAuth consent — cancels the in-progress AddAccountDialog handshake

submitAccountOAuthCode.exempt: provider OAuth consent — user pastes the returned code in AddAccountDialog

createApiKeyAccount.exempt: provider credential consent — user-entered API-key account in AddAccountDialog

tunnelCredential.exempt: chat plumbing — agent-rendered credential-tunnel card in MessageContent

postBootstrapExchange.exempt: setup/onboarding — pre-agent bootstrap token exchange in BootstrapStep

setInboxChatMute.exempt: chat plumbing — per-conversation mute toggle in the chat sidebar

spawnShellSession.exempt: chat plumbing — opens a shell/terminal conversation from the sidebar

gap.reason: local-model download has no chat/voice action twin
local-model download cancel has no chat/voice action twin
activating a local model has no chat/voice action twin
clearing the active local model has no chat/voice action twin
uninstalling a local model has no chat/voice action twin
verifying a local model has no chat/voice action twin
local-inference routing policy has no chat/voice action twin
local-inference preferred-provider has no chat/voice action twin
local-inference slot assignment has no chat/voice action twin
voice-model update has no chat/voice action twin
pinning a voice model has no chat/voice action twin
voice-model preferences have no chat/voice action twin
custom-action authoring has no chat/voice action twin
custom-action authoring has no chat/voice action twin
custom-action authoring has no chat/voice action twin
custom-action authoring has no chat/voice action twin
custom-action testing has no chat/voice action twin
transcript deletion has no chat/voice action twin
transcript rename/update has no chat/voice action twin
capabilities training auto-config toggle has no semantic twin

POST */api/lifeops/occurrences/*/complet.note: TodayTodosWidget completion uses the LifeOps occurrence route; OWNER_TODOS is the user-facing chat twin for todo occurrence completion

DYNAMIC(method) /api/skills/curated/*|/a.note: CharacterLearnedSkillsSection uses a typed POST|DELETE method variable for promote/disable/delete

POST /api/plugins/*/reveal.exempt: masked-secret reveal is a guarded read behind a POST; the write twin is CREDENTIALS

POST /api/secrets/manager/install.exempt: local password-manager install is an interactive OS-level flow

POST /api/secrets/manager/signin.exempt: password-manager sign-in needs the user's own master credentials

POST /api/secrets/manager/signout.exempt: password-manager sign-out pairs with the interactive sign-in flow

POST ANDROID_SMS_GATEWAY_WEBHOOK_URL.exempt: background SMS-forwarding bridge to the cloud gateway, not an on-screen control

POST /api/setup/telegram/start.note: Telegram bot setup entry point (TelegramBotSetupPanel); CONNECTOR is the setup/control facade

POST /api/setup/telegram/cancel.note: cancels the Telegram bot setup flow
